dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully loaded and adhered to the provided rule context, as evidenced by the successful schema validation in the rules-context-loader span. The alignment-engine also passed validation, confirming sustained compliance throughout the flow. The 504 timeout on the evolution map step was a provider-side network issue, not a governance failure.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-intent-generator and alignment-engine spans completed successfully with substantial token usage, indicating detailed state mapping and intent derivation. However, the gateway timeout on the evolution map step interrupted the full causal chain generation, capping the observable depth at a moderate but structurally sound level.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration flow executed to completion across three of four steps, suggesting trade-offs were considered during state generation and alignment. The successful schema validations imply resolved tensions met structural requirements, though the provider timeout limited the explicit surfacing of all architectural trade-offs.
